task_completion.visual_evidence: The StudioTax 2024 application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the taxpayer's name and province.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The personal information screen or summary in StudioTax shows the taxpayer name as 'Julian Vance' and the province of residence as 'NS' or 'Nova Scotia'.
A T4 slip entry screen or income summary in StudioTax shows an employment income amount of $115,000.
A T4A slip entry, research grant form, or income summary in StudioTax shows a Net Research Grant amount of exactly $6,200.

task_completion.description: Enter professional dues and political contributions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Deductions or credits screens in StudioTax show professional dues of $2,300 (or partials of $1,100 and $1,200) and political contributions of $500 (federal) and $300 (provincial).

task_completion.description: Save the completed tax return to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or the StudioTax title bar shows the file being saved as 'julian_vance.24t' in the directory 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the StudioTax GUI to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to enter data, rather than using a script or terminal to generate the .24t file.

integrity.description: Verify the tax return data is not spoofed in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tax return data is seen within the actual StudioTax application windows, not typed into a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the file was saved using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file saving process is done through the StudioTax 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog, rather than via command line file creation or moving.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Julian Vance. Province: NS. Expected Output Path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\julian_vance.24t. Key Tax Data to Verify: T4 employment income is $115,000; Net Research Grant is exactly $6,200; Professional dues are $2,300; Political contributions are $500 (federal) and $300 (provincial).
